cast.name: 多米尼克·霍华德 Dominic Howard
克里斯·沃尔斯滕霍姆 Chris Wolstenholme

this_title: Muse - Live At Rome Olympic Stadium
introduction: Live at Rome Olympic Stadium is a live album and video by English alternative rock band Muse, which will be released with on 7 November 2013 in United Kingdom, and on 12 November 2013 in Italy. The album contains the band's performance at Rome's Stadio Olimpico on 6 July 2013, in front of a crowd of 60,963 people. The concert was a part of The Unsustainable Tour, which is a moniker for the band's summer 2013 European leg of The 2nd Law World Tour.
chinese_title: Muse - Live At Rome Olympic Stadium
